---
title: "Comethyl Linear Modeling Report"
subtitle: "Parameterized post-Comethyl analysis"
author: "George Kuodza"
date: "`r Sys.Date()`"
output:
  pdf_document: default
params:
  me_file: NULL
  trait_file: NULL
  formulas_file: NULL
  module_name: NULL
  output_dir: NULL
  sample_id_col: "Sample_ID"
  trait_exclude_file: NULL
  tech_vars_file: NULL
  derive_early_menarche: TRUE
---

knitr::opts_chunk$set(message = FALSE, warning = FALSE)

suppressPackageStartupMessages({
  library(tidyverse)
  library(openxlsx)
  library(modelsummary)
  library(kableExtra)
  library(broom)
})

# -----------------------------
# Parameter checks
# -----------------------------
required_params <- c("me_file", "trait_file", "formulas_file", "module_name", "output_dir")
missing_params <- required_params[
  vapply(required_params, function(x) is.null(params[[x]]) || !nzchar(params[[x]]), logical(1))
]

if (length(missing_params) > 0) {
  stop("Missing required params: ", paste(missing_params, collapse = ", "))
}

dir.create(params$output_dir, recursive = TRUE, showWarnings = FALSE)

# -----------------------------
# Helpers
# -----------------------------
read_lines_safe <- function(path) {
  if (is.null(path) || is.na(path) || !nzchar(path) || !file.exists(path)) return(character(0))
  x <- readLines(path, warn = FALSE)
  x <- trimws(x)
  x[nzchar(x)]
}

clean_trait_data <- function(trait_file,
                             trait_exclude_file = NULL,
                             derive_early_menarche = TRUE) {

  colData_raw <- openxlsx::read.xlsx(trait_file, rowNames = TRUE)

  # Replace "M" with minimum numeric value in each column
  colData_raw[] <- lapply(colData_raw, function(x) {
    x_chr <- as.character(x)
    suppressWarnings({
      min_val <- min(as.numeric(x_chr[x_chr != "M"]), na.rm = TRUE)
      as.numeric(replace(x_chr, x_chr == "M", min_val))
    })
  })

  # Replace N and . with NA
  colData_raw[colData_raw == "N" | colData_raw == "."] <- NA

  # Drop all-NA columns
  colData_raw <- colData_raw[, colSums(is.na(colData_raw)) < nrow(colData_raw), drop = FALSE]

  # Exclude columns from optional text file
  cols_to_remove <- read_lines_safe(trait_exclude_file)
  if (length(cols_to_remove) > 0) {
    colData_raw <- colData_raw[, !colnames(colData_raw) %in% cols_to_remove, drop = FALSE]
  }

  # Optional early menarche derivation
  to_num_missingdot <- function(x) as.numeric(dplyr::na_if(as.character(x), "."))

  if (isTRUE(derive_early_menarche) &&
      all(c("agemenF0", "agemenF1", "agemenF2") %in% colnames(colData_raw))) {
    colData_raw <- colData_raw %>%
      mutate(
        agemenF0_num = to_num_missingdot(agemenF0),
        early_menF0  = case_when(
          !is.na(agemenF0_num) & agemenF0_num <= 11 ~ 1,
          !is.na(agemenF0_num) & agemenF0_num > 11  ~ 0,
          TRUE ~ NA_real_
        ),
        agemenF1_num = to_num_missingdot(agemenF1),
        early_menF1  = case_when(
          !is.na(agemenF1_num) & agemenF1_num <= 11 ~ 1,
          !is.na(agemenF1_num) & agemenF1_num > 11  ~ 0,
          TRUE ~ NA_real_
        ),
        agemenF2_num = to_num_missingdot(agemenF2),
        early_menF2  = case_when(
          !is.na(agemenF2_num) & agemenF2_num <= 11 ~ 1,
          !is.na(agemenF2_num) & agemenF2_num > 11  ~ 0,
          TRUE ~ NA_real_
        )
      ) %>%
      select(-agemenF0_num, -agemenF1_num, -agemenF2_num)
  }

  colData_raw
}

load_me_data <- function(me_file, sample_id_col = "Sample_ID") {
  me_data <- readr::read_csv(me_file, show_col_types = FALSE)

  first_col <- colnames(me_data)[1]
  colnames(me_data)[1] <- sample_id_col

  me_data %>%
    mutate(across(all_of(sample_id_col), as.character))
}

merge_me_and_traits <- function(me_data, trait_data, sample_id_col = "Sample_ID") {
  trait_data[[sample_id_col]] <- rownames(trait_data)
  trait_data[[sample_id_col]] <- as.character(trait_data[[sample_id_col]])

  dplyr::inner_join(
    trait_data,
    me_data,
    by = sample_id_col
  )
}

fit_models_from_spec <- function(model_spec, analysis_df, module_name) {
  formulas <- setNames(
    lapply(model_spec$formula, function(f) {
      as.formula(gsub("\\{MODULE\\}", module_name, f))
    }),
    model_spec$label
  )

  models <- lapply(formulas, function(f) lm(f, data = analysis_df))
  models
}

extract_model_table <- function(models) {
  purrr::imap_dfr(models, function(mod, nm) {
    broom::tidy(mod) %>%
      mutate(model = nm, .before = 1)
  })
}

extract_model_glance <- function(models) {
  purrr::imap_dfr(models, function(mod, nm) {
    broom::glance(mod) %>%
      mutate(model = nm, .before = 1)
  })
}

param_tbl <- tibble::tibble(
  Parameter = c("me_file", "trait_file", "formulas_file", "module_name", "output_dir", "sample_id_col"),
  Value = c(params$me_file, params$trait_file, params$formulas_file, params$module_name, params$output_dir, params$sample_id_col)
)

knitr::kable(param_tbl, format = "latex", booktabs = TRUE) %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling(latex_options = c("hold_position"))

trait_data <- clean_trait_data(
  trait_file = params$trait_file,
  trait_exclude_file = params$trait_exclude_file,
  derive_early_menarche = params$derive_early_menarche
)

me_data <- load_me_data(
  me_file = params$me_file,
  sample_id_col = params$sample_id_col
)

analysis_df <- merge_me_and_traits(
  me_data = me_data,
  trait_data = trait_data,
  sample_id_col = params$sample_id_col
)

if (!(params$module_name %in% colnames(analysis_df))) {
  stop("Module column not found in merged data: ", params$module_name)
}

model_spec <- read.csv(params$formulas_file, stringsAsFactors = FALSE)

if (!all(c("label", "formula") %in% colnames(model_spec))) {
  stop("formulas_file must contain columns: label, formula")
}

dim_summary <- tibble::tibble(
  Object = c("trait_data", "me_data", "analysis_df"),
  Rows = c(nrow(trait_data), nrow(me_data), nrow(analysis_df)),
  Columns = c(ncol(trait_data), ncol(me_data), ncol(analysis_df))
)

knitr::kable(dim_summary, format = "latex", booktabs = TRUE) %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling(latex_options = c("hold_position"))

vars_used <- unique(unlist(strsplit(
  paste(model_spec$formula, collapse = " "),
  split = "[^A-Za-z0-9_.]+"
)))
vars_used <- vars_used[nzchar(vars_used)]
vars_used <- setdiff(vars_used, c("MODULE"))
vars_used <- unique(gsub("\\{MODULE\\}", params$module_name, vars_used, fixed = TRUE))

availability <- tibble::tibble(
  variable = vars_used,
  present_in_analysis_df = vars_used %in% colnames(analysis_df)
)

knitr::kable(availability, format = "latex", booktabs = TRUE) %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling(latex_options = c("hold_position"))

model_vars <- unique(c(
  params$module_name,
  unlist(str_extract_all(paste(model_spec$formula, collapse = " "), "[A-Za-z][A-Za-z0-9_.]*"))
))
model_vars <- unique(gsub("\\{MODULE\\}", params$module_name, model_vars, fixed = TRUE))
model_vars <- intersect(model_vars, colnames(analysis_df))

missing_tbl <- tibble::tibble(
  variable = model_vars,
  n_missing = vapply(model_vars, function(v) sum(is.na(analysis_df[[v]])), numeric(1)),
  pct_missing = round(100 * n_missing / nrow(analysis_df), 2)
)

knitr::kable(missing_tbl, format = "latex", booktabs = TRUE) %>%
  kableExtra::kable_styling(latex_options = c("hold_position"))

models <- fit_models_from_spec(
  model_spec = model_spec,
  analysis_df = analysis_df,
  module_name = params$module_name
)

modelsummary::modelsummary(
  models,
  statistic = "({std.error})",
  stars = TRUE,
  gof_map = c("nobs", "r.squared", "adj.r.squared", "AIC"),
  output = "kableExtra"
)

modelsummary::modelsummary(
  models,
  statistic = "({std.error})",
  stars = TRUE,
  gof_map = c("nobs", "adj.r.squared"),
  output = "kableExtra"
)

tech_vars <- read_lines_safe(params$tech_vars_file)
tech_vars <- intersect(tech_vars, colnames(analysis_df))

if (length(tech_vars) >= 2) {
  tech_df <- analysis_df[, tech_vars, drop = FALSE]
  cor_mat <- cor(tech_df, use = "pairwise.complete.obs")

  knitr::kable(round(cor_mat, 3), format = "latex", booktabs = TRUE) %>%
    kableExtra::kable_styling(latex_options = c("scale_down", "hold_position"))
} else {
  cat("No technical covariate correlation table requested.\n")
}

coef_tbl <- extract_model_table(models)
fit_tbl  <- extract_model_glance(models)

readr::write_csv(analysis_df, file.path(params$output_dir, paste0(params$module_name, "_analysis_df.csv")))
readr::write_csv(coef_tbl,    file.path(params$output_dir, paste0(params$module_name, "_model_coefficients.csv")))
readr::write_csv(fit_tbl,     file.path(params$output_dir, paste0(params$module_name, "_model_fit_stats.csv")))

wb <- openxlsx::createWorkbook()
openxlsx::addWorksheet(wb, "model_spec")
openxlsx::writeData(wb, "model_spec", model_spec)

openxlsx::addWorksheet(wb, "coefficients")
openxlsx::writeData(wb, "coefficients", coef_tbl)

openxlsx::addWorksheet(wb, "fit_stats")
openxlsx::writeData(wb, "fit_stats", fit_tbl)

openxlsx::addWorksheet(wb, "missingness")
openxlsx::writeData(wb, "missingness", missing_tbl)

openxlsx::saveWorkbook(
  wb,
  file = file.path(params$output_dir, paste0(params$module_name, "_linear_model_results.xlsx")),
  overwrite = TRUE
)
